creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 149967
linuxdoc-tools port files

Trying to update another port, I found the 'linuxdoc' script from linuxdoc-tools is used to build documentation and it wasn't available on FreeBSD, so here comes the port...

About the upstream site: The one referenced in the distribution tarball is down and I learned the maintainer changed, but it is someone from the debian team (and also was before), so I guess putting the debian package tracker for linuxdoc-tools for now would be ok?

BR, Felix
